requirement.title: Fix blank dashboard on Vercel (production React + drop SRI)
requirement.description: User reports /dashboard/ renders blank on mobile Safari while / works fine. SPA uses react.development.js + SRI hashes from unpkg, a known-fragile combination. Swap to production React builds and drop SRI to unblock the deploy. Pre-bundling to remove the CDN dependency entirely is queued as a follow-up.

triage.notes: Matches a known item in memory/roadmap.md tech debt register.

orchestrator.summary: Single-file fix; root cause and trade-off documented in ADR-011.
